ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bus stop location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bus stop location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the bus stop */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the bus stop is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the bus stop is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the bus stop */,
  "shelter" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is shelter at the stop (Yes/No) */,
  "current_service" INTEGER /* Current service status of the stop */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bus stop was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "ada_compliant" TEXT /* Indicates if the stop is ADA compliant */,
  "bicycle_rack" TEXT /* Indicates if there is a bicycle rack at the stop */,
  "real_time_info" TEXT /* Indicates if the stop has real-time information displays */,
  "surveillance_cameras" TEXT /* Indicates if the stop has surveillance cameras */,
  "service_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the service_status table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_shelter FOREIGN KEY ("shelter") REFERENCES shelter_types ("shelter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_current_service FOREIGN KEY ("current_service") REFERENCES service_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the service status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelter_types" (
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelter */,
  "shelter_type" TEXT /* Name of the shelter type (e.g., Full, Partial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shelter type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the shelter (number of people it can accommodate) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the shelter construction */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date when the shelter was last inspected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership_data" (
  "ridership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ridership record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ridership data is recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the ridership data is recorded */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for which the ridership data is recorded */,
  "hour_of_day" TEXT /* Hour of the day for which the ridership data is recorded */,
  "avg_on" INTEGER /* Average number of boardings for the year */,
  "avg_off" INTEGER /* Average number of alightings for the year */,
  "avg_total" INTEGER /* Total average of boardings and alightings for the year */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Indicates if the data is for peak hours */,
  "low_ridership" TEXT /* Indicates if the stop has low ridership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ridership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transit planner, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date and time of the last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., ridership, maintenance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "is_archived" TEXT /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the services provided at this stop */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the service_types table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the service */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the service */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_services_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_services_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop requiring maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance work performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the technicians table */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments regarding the stop or service */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) provided by the user for the stop or service */,
  "is_resolved" TEXT /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., Regular, Express) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)
